short_blurb: Roofing repairs and replacement in Granada Hills, CA.
local_note: Granada Hills is a quiet residential community with a mix of 1950s–70s ranch homes and newer builds. The neighborhood's mature tree canopy means we often find debris-clogged gutters and valleys, and moss or algae growth on north-facing roof sections. We include gutter cleaning and debris clearing with every re-roofing project and can add zinc strips to inhibit future biological growth.

faqs.q: I have moss growing on my Granada Hills roof — is that a problem?
faqs.a: Yes. Moss retains moisture against shingles and accelerates granule loss and shingle lift. We remove it safely during inspection and can apply zinc or copper treatments to prevent regrowth after your new roof is installed.
